scored_papers.title: Geometric Constraints on the Pre-Recombination Expansion History from the Hubble Tension
scored_papers.abstract: I perform a model-independent reconstruction of the background pre-recombination expansion history of the Universe. I find that purely early-time resolutions to the Hubble tension, satisfying the geometric CMB constraints, exist at the background level. This class of solutions requires a smooth transition around matter-radiation equality, characterized by a $\simeq 15\%$ expansion rate enhancement prior to recombination. This result serves as a blueprint for future model-building approaches, providing a background stress-test for Hubble tension proposals.
scored_papers.reason: Hubble tension を pre-recombination の geometric CMB 制約だけで model-independent に評価🌌 LiteBIRD context で early-time 解の余地を測る blueprint📐
scored_papers.summary: matter-radiation equality 周りで ~15% の expansion rate enhancement が geometric CMB と整合、early-time Hubble tension 解の background-level stress test✨
